Investment Products | Not FDIC or Government Insured | Not a Bank Deposit | May Lose Value

Page 1
Memory Coupon Barrier Autocall Notes Based Upon
the Worst Performing of the Russell 2000 Index and the S&P 500 Index
Terms and Conditions
June 4, 2026
General Information
Issuer Citigroup Global Markets Funding Luxembourg S.C.A. (“CGMFL”)
Guarantor Citigroup Global Markets Limited (“CGML”)
Issuance Programme Global Medium Term Note Programme
Securities Debt Securities linked to the performance of the Underlyings
Offer Memory Coupon Barrier Autocall Notes Based Upon the Worst Performing of the
Russell 2000 Index and the S&P 500 Index (“Notes”)
Issue Size USD 1,050,000
Currency U.S. dollar (“USD”)
Specified Denomination USD 1,000 per Note
Minimum Investment USD 1,000, and increments of USD 1,000 thereafter
Issue Price 100.00% of the Specified Denomination
Strike Date / Trade Date June 4, 2026
Issue Date June 11, 2026
Final Valuation Date June 5, 2028
Maturity Date June 12, 2028
The Underlyings
1
The Russell 2000 Index RTY Index Index
New York Stock Exchange
Market Inc. 2927.000 2927.000 1902.550 1902.550 2927.000
2
The S&P 500 Index SPX Index Index
New York Stock Exchange
Market Inc. 7576.00 7576.00 4924.40 4924.40 7576.00
Strike Level For each Underlying, 100.00% of its respective Initial Level
Knock-In Barrier Level For each Underlying, 65.00% of its respective Initial Level
Coupon Barrier Level For each Underlying, 65.00% of its respective Initial Level
Autocall Barrier Level For each Underlying, 100.00% of its respective Initial Level
The Payout
Contingent Coupon Amount If payable, the Contingent Coupon Amount will be USD 25.375 or 2.5375% per quarter
(corresponding to approximately 10.15% per annum) of the Specified Denomination.
Contingent Coupon Valuation Date Contingent Coupon Payment Date
September 4, 2026 September 14, 2026
December 4, 2026 December 11, 2026
March 4, 2027 March 11, 2027
June 4, 2027 June 11, 2027
September 7, 2027 September 14, 2027
December 6, 2027 December 13, 2027
March 6, 2028 March 13, 2028
Final Valuation Date Maturity Date
Mandatory Early Redemption
Autocall Valuation Date Mandatory Early Redemption Date
September 4, 2026 September 14, 2026
December 4, 2026 December 11, 2026
March 4, 2027 March 11, 2027
June 4, 2027 June 11, 2027
September 7, 2027 September 14, 2027
December 6, 2027 December 13, 2027
March 6, 2028 March 13, 2028
The “Barrier Event” means that the Final Level of any Underlying is less than its respective Knock-In Barrier Level
Series Number CGMFL177813
ISIN XS3180975347
